Local Mobile Detailing in Chapin SC

Serving Chapin — the Capital of Lake Murray — including Timberlake and lakefront communities. We detail daily drivers, trucks, and boats at your home or dock.

  • Interior Detail — from $200

  • Routine Reset subscription — $225/month

Service Areas

Mobile detailing at your home or office in Columbia, Lexington, West Columbia, Irmo, Cayce, Chapin, Blythewood, Swansea, and Newberry SC. No travel fees in the Midlands.
